commands: bash -c 'set -e; su - ubuntu -c \"cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main\"; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra; echo "=== REBUILDING FRAME-PROCESSOR ==="; docker-compose build frame-processor; echo "=== STARTING FRAME-PROCESSOR ==="; docker-compose up -d frame-processor; sleep 5; echo "=== LOGS ==="; docker logs frame-processor --tail=20'
